query: SELECT id, first_name, last_name FROM customers LIMIT 5
description: Basic analyst query, no restricted columns

query: SELECT id, first_name, email FROM customers WHERE id = 1
SELECT id, amount, description FROM transactions LIMIT 10
SELECT id, first_name, last_name, ssn FROM customers LIMIT 3
description: Compliance officer has full column access but SSN triggers outbound block

query: SELECT id, account_number, balance FROM accounts LIMIT 3
SELECT * FROM customers WHERE email = 'alice@example.com' AND phone = '555-123-4567'
description: Query with PII - email and phone detected inbound
Query with account number PII inbound

query: SELECT id, name, email, phone FROM advisors LIMIT 5
SELECT id, first_name, last_name, email, phone FROM customers LIMIT 5
description: Compliance officer query with PII in output - names/emails/phones redacted

query: SELECT c.id, c.first_name, a.balance FROM customers c JOIN accounts a ON c.id = a.customer_id ORDER BY a.balance DESC LIMIT 5
